transcription: Mehla ya ka e lokile, aowa
ULabake wakhumbula izikhathi ezimbili kuphela lapho elwa no-Alamu mayelana nabathandi bemfihlo, kodwa lokho kwakuse-London.
translation: Labake remembered only two occasions when she fought Alamu over secret lovers, but that was in London.
reference: Labake remembered only two occasions when she fought Alamu over secret lovers, but that was in London.
hypothesis: I love you very much, I am very crazy for you.

transcription: Gape, ebile di iri Txe mmalwa le meno aka bjalo a nhlopha ebile a nkgwatha mailutlo. A' ye ke ye nngwe ya khuetxo ya go hlwekixa, ge Eba go bjalo gotla txea sebaka se Seka Kang Kang  sa appx gore e felele
translation: Anyway, its been several hours and my teeth are now irritating me, and sensitive.  Is this a side effect from the cleaning, and if so how long appx will it last?
reference: Anyway, its been several hours and my teeth are now irritating me, and sensitive.  Is this a side effect from the cleaning, and if so how long appx will it last?
hypothesis: Gabe, i be iri re tshe mmalwa le meno a ka byalo a ntlopha ibile a ngqhatha maigotlo. A yegienwe ya kuetjo ya go hlokisha. Ge ba go bialo go tlatjea sebaka sese ka kang sa a pox gore e fele.
